problem:
Can't bind to 'formGroup' since it isn't a known property of 'form'.

The situation

I am trying to make what should be a very simple form in my Angular application, but no matter what, it never works.

The Angular version

Angular 2.0.0 RC5

The error

Can't bind to 'formGroup' since it isn't a known property of 'form'
expected_solution_keywords: Can't bind to 'formGroup' since it isn't a known property of 'form'
memory_hint:
Can't bind to 'formGroup' since it isn't a known property of 'form'.

RC6/RC7/Final release FIX

To fix this error, you just need to import ReactiveFormsModule from @angular/forms in your module. Here's the example of a basic
failure_without_memory:
error

Can't bind to 'formGroup' since it isn't a known property of 'form'
